title: The Toast Mod
description: Adds toast and toast-related things to Minecraft.
body:
## Have you ever wondered why Minecraft has bread, but no toast?
So did we.

**Introducing, the Toast Mod.**

**![banner](https://i.imgur.com/XQjsG1C.png)**

Making toast is simple

First, you’ll have to craft a bread knife.

![Bread Knife Crafting](https://i.imgur.com/gTkYL2v.png)

Second, slice your bread by holding the knife in your main hand, the bread in your offhand, and using the knife.

You now have sliced bread! Congratulations!

![Sliced Bread](https://i.imgur.com/dhyAdRB.png)

Third, get out your trusty pocket campfire, and toast the bread just how you like it.

Be careful not to burn it though!

![fire](https://i.imgur.com/BcwCxMC.png)

Finally, enjoy your toast.

#### **But wait!**

Why should you have to settle for regular old plain bread and toast?

Throw some flavour into the mix with Pumpkin Toast or Berry Toast, made, of course, from Pumpkin Bread and Berry Bread!

![berry bread](https://i.imgur.com/AoI6wMI.png)![pumpkin bread](https://i.imgur.com/X1FzAWG.png)

And that’s it!

#### **Toast makes Minecraft better.**

![all](https://i.imgur.com/SbPFAlv.png)

_(See if you can find any of the other toast-related secrets this mod has to offer!)_
